title: The Human-Centred AI Development Cycle by Sangwon Lee
description: A cyclical flowchart illustrating the iterative process of integrating human feedback into AI system development, as conceptualized by Sangwon Lee.
relationships: An iterative cycle connecting each element in sequence: Identification informs Design, which leads to Deployment, which enables Monitoring, which provides data for Analysis, which then loops back to refine the initial Human Need Identification and inform the next cycle of Design.
